headline: Eli Lilly (NYSE:LLY) Delivers Strong Q1 CY2026 Numbers, Stock Soars
summary: Global pharmaceutical company Eli Lilly (NYSE:LLY) reported Q1 CY2026 results topping the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 55.5% year on year to $19.8 billion. The company’s full-year revenue guidance of $83.5 billion at the midpoint came in 2% above analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $8.55 per share was 25.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: Eli Lilly (NYSE:LLY) Delivers Strong Q1 CY2026 Numbers, Stock Soars
content.summary: Global pharmaceutical company Eli Lilly (NYSE:LLY) reported Q1 CY2026 results topping the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 55.5% year on year to $19.8 billion. The company’s full-year revenue guidance of $83.5 billion at the midpoint came in 2% above analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $8.55 per share was 25.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: S&P 500 Rides Tech Earnings Wave Despite Inflation Warning Shot

headline: Eli Lilly (LLY) Is Down 7.6% After Upbeat Q1 And Foundayo Approval - What's Changed
summary: Eli Lilly and Company recently reported first-quarter 2026 results that exceeded analyst expectations, raised its full-year revenue and earnings guidance, and secured U.S. FDA approval for Foundayo, the only GLP-1 weight-loss pill that can be taken at any time without food or water restrictions. The combination of stronger-than-forecast GLP-1 revenues and a differentiated oral option for obesity and diabetes care underscores how Lilly is reinforcing its position in cardiometabolic medicines...

content.title: Eli Lilly (LLY) Is Down 7.6% After Upbeat Q1 And Foundayo Approval - What's Changed
content.summary: Eli Lilly and Company recently reported first-quarter 2026 results that exceeded analyst expectations, raised its full-year revenue and earnings guidance, and secured U.S. FDA approval for Foundayo, the only GLP-1 weight-loss pill that can be taken at any time without food or water restrictions. The combination of stronger-than-forecast GLP-1 revenues and a differentiated oral option for obesity and diabetes care underscores how Lilly is reinforcing its position in cardiometabolic medicines...
